data.title: High Roller Technologies, Inc. (NYSE: ROLR) prices $25 million offering for sale of 1,892,506 shares at $13.21/share.
data.description: In Las Vegas, Nevada, on Jan. 19, 2026, High Roller Technologies, Inc. (NYSE American: ROLR), the operator of online casino brands High Roller and Fruta, disclosed the pricing of a registered direct offering. This involved the sale of 1,892,506 shares of its common stock at $13.21 per share. The offering is expected to generate approximately $25 million in gross proceeds, before fees and expenses. The Company plans to allocate the net proceeds towards sales, marketing, expansion, product development, diversification, and general corporate purposes. The offering, consisting of all shares of Common Stock, is projected to close on Jan. 21, 2026, pending the fulfillment of standard closing conditions.

data.title: Mediacom sets memorial service in Italy for founder Rocco B. Commisso on Jan 26, 2026, at Florence Cathedral at 6:00 p.m.
data.description: Mediacom Communications has revealed plans for a memorial in Italy to honor its founder, chairman, and CEO, Rocco B. Commisso. The service will take place at the Duomo di Firenze — Cattedrale di Santa Maria del Fiore in Florence, Italy, on Monday, January 26, 2026, at 6:00 p.m. local time. Giuseppe B. Commisso, Rocco's son, shared that Florence held a special place in his father's heart. The address for the service is Piazza del Duomo, 50122 Florence, Italy. It is a significant event for the company and the Commisso family.

data.title: SkyBridge CEO Anthony Scaramucci advocates for Solana to reduce transaction costs; highlights $4 trillion annual verification expenses in global economy.
data.description: The CEO of SkyBridge Capital, Anthony Scaramucci, emphasized the inefficiencies in the current financial system and its reluctance to embrace blockchain-based technologies like tokenization. Speaking at the Solana Breakpoint Conference, he highlighted the staggering $4 trillion spent annually on transaction verification, encompassing credit card and wire fees. Scaramucci noted that significant changes face resistance initially but emphasized the transformative potential of eliminating this friction, stating that it could revolutionize the global economy's operating system. He stressed the $4 trillion lost to transaction friction annually and its potential impact. For the complete story, visit Benzinga.com.

data.title: Birchtree Investments partners with Spark Newswire for investor relations to boost American investor awareness for $250,000.
data.description: Vancouver, BC, January 19, 2026 - Birchtree Investments Ltd. (CSE: BRCH), an investment firm focused on profitably divesting its assets, has entered an agreement with Spark Newswire Inc. for financial publishing and digital marketing services, overseen by the Company's CEO. The initiative aims to boost awareness and interest among investors, specifically targeting the American market. Beginning on January 19, 2026, the services will run for two months, with Birchtree paying Spark Newswire CAD$250,000. No securities will be issued to Spark Newswire as part of the deal, with both entities maintaining an arms-length relationship and no previous association.

data.title: NopalCyber recognized as Top 250 Global MSSP for 2nd year by MSSP Alert, an elite group in cybersecurity.
data.description: In Hyderabad, India, on January 19, 2026, NopalCyber has been recognized as one of the Top 250 Managed Security Service Providers (MSSPs) globally by MSSP Alert, a renowned industry authority under CyberRisk Alliance. This prestigious acknowledgment positions NopalCyber within a select group of worldwide MSSPs, reflecting their exceptional standing in the cybersecurity sector.

data.title: Maybelline New York appoints Chinese boys group Teens in Times (TNT) as Brand Ambassadors and Global Partners.
data.description: On January 19, 2026, in Shanghai, Maybelline New York, a top makeup brand, revealed the selection of Chinese group Teens in Times (TNT) as their latest Brand Ambassadors and Global Partners. The partnership between the two signifies a significant milestone in the industry.

data.title: Rokid Ai Glasses Style now globally available, priced from $299, shipping worldwide, includes ChatGPT, Qwen, DeepSeek.
data.description: Rokid, a global leader in AI technology, has introduced the world's initial open ecosystem AI smart glasses. These innovative glasses, tailored for use with ChatGPT, Qwen, DeepSeek, and other programs, are ultra-lightweight, prioritize prescription needs, and are now available for shipment worldwide. The glasses are priced at $299 and can be purchased from various locations. This development was announced on January 19, 2026, in San Francisco.
